title: SonicStream
description: A high-performance music streaming platform inspired by Spotify. SonicStream leverages the Spotify Web API to deliver real-time track searches, seamless playback, and personalized playlist management within a stunning, glassmorphic interface designed for both desktop and mobile users.
ui_features: Real-time Music Playback with Interactive Seek Bar
Dynamic Search Engine for Artists, Albums, and Tracks
Glassmorphic Dashboard with Fluid Motion Transitions
Responsive Grid Layout for Seamless Cross-Device Experience
Premium UI with Deep Obsidian, Emerald, and Slate Accents
